title: Bleu_2ay's Enderman Model
description: A texture pack that changes the model of the Enderman!
body:
A resource pack that gives Endermen a more modern style design.

They now have a smaller body, a wider head, and intriguing alien ears! They could even be called cute - not that they weren't before. Every single new element is directly based on details found in the original vanilla design.

Requires Entity Model Features mod to work, though it could also run with Optifine.

Design and model by [Bleu_2ay on Twitter](https://x.com/Bleu_2ay)

Coded by [tellioaridoitsu on Twitter](https://x.com/tellioaridoitsu)
